revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-2-110

Alternative terms: Port, Slot

In some types of compressed air fog signal apparatus e.g. siren or diaphone, an aperture, generally narrow and elongated, on both the fixed and moving parts of the modulator of the compressed air.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Fog signal port}}
